diagrams.title: Stars and Bars Example
diagrams.description: Visual representation of selecting 6 items from 3 types using stars and bars
diagrams.purpose: Understand how stars and bars represents combinations with repetition

diagrams.title: Formula Derivation Visual
diagrams.description: Deriving C(n+r-1, r) by visualizing r identical items placed in n distinct boxes
elements: n boxes represented as n-1 dividers
Choosing positions for r stars among (r+n-1) total positions
diagrams.purpose: Visual proof of the combinations with repetition formula

diagrams.title: Problem Types Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison between permutations, combinations without repetition, and combinations with repetition
elements: Order matters vs Order doesn't matter
diagrams.purpose: Choose correct method based on problem conditions
